items.name: HexViewControl
items.summary: Renders and edits binary data as offsets, byte columns, and ASCII text inside an Avalonia control.

syntax.content: public class HexViewControl : Control, IAvaloniaObjectDebug, INotifyPropertyChanged, IDataContextProvider, ILogical, IThemeVariantHost, IResourceHost2, IResourceHost, IResourceNode, IStyleHost, ISetLogicalParent, ISetInheritanceParent, ISupportInitialize, IAvaloniaListItemValidator<ILogical>, IStyleable, INamed, IAvaloniaListItemValidator<Visual>, IInputElement, IDataTemplateHost, IVisualBrushInitialize, ISetterValue, ILogicalScrollable, IScrollable
public static readonly DirectProperty<HexViewControl, ObservableCollection<HexAnnotation>> AnnotationsProperty
public void MoveCaretTo(long offset, int nibbleIndex = 0, bool ensureVisible = true)
public bool TryGetByteAt(long offset, scoped out byte value)
public Action<long, byte>? ByteWriteAction { get; set; }
public Func<long, long, IEnumerable<long>>? EditedOffsetsProvider { get; set; }
public Func<long, long, IEnumerable<long>>? DifferencesProvider { get; set; }

items.name: HexAnnotation
items.summary: Describes a labeled byte range rendered as an annotation in HexViewControl.

items.name: IHexFormatter
items.summary: Formats logical byte lines into the offset, hex, and ASCII representation rendered by HexViewControl.

syntax.content: void AddLine(byte[] bytes, long lineNumber, StringBuilder sb, int toBase)

items.name: ILineReader
items.summary: Reads bytes by logical offset and line width for the HexView rendering pipeline.

syntax.content: int Read(long offset, byte[] buffer, int count)

items.name: EditMode
items.summary: Determines whether edits are projected as in-place overwrites or logical insert/delete operations.

items.name: ByteOverlay
items.summary: Projects logical edits over an underlying <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Model.ILineReader" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> without mutating the original source immediately.

syntax.content: public int Read(long offset, byte[] buffer, int count)
public IEnumerable<(long Offset, byte[] Data)> GetInserts()
public IEnumerable<(long Offset, long Length)> GetDeletions()
public void OverwriteByte(long offset, byte value)
public void InsertBytes(long offset, byte[] bytes)
public void DeleteRange(long offset, long length)
public void ReplaceRange(long offset, long length, byte[] bytes)

items.name: ByteOverlayLineReader
items.summary: Exposes a <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Services.ByteOverlay" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> through the <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Model.ILineReader" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> abstraction.

syntax.content: public byte[] GetLine(long lineNumber, int width)
public int Read(long offset, byte[] buffer, int count)

items.name: EditOpType
items.summary: Describes the kind of logical edit stored in <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Services.EditJournal" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref>.

items.name: EditOperation
items.summary: Represents a single logical edit or edit batch applied to a <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Services.ByteOverlay" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref>.

items.name: EditJournal
items.summary: Records logical overlay edits and replays them for undo and redo.

items.name: HexAnnotationStorage
items.summary: Loads and saves <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Model.HexAnnotation" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref> collections as JSON.

syntax.content: public static void Save(string path, IEnumerable<HexAnnotation> annotations)

items.name: HexFormatter
items.summary: Formats logical byte lines for display in the hex and ASCII panes.

syntax.content: public void AddLine(byte[] bytes, long lineNumber, StringBuilder sb, int toBase)

items.name: HexSearchService
items.summary: Provides address parsing, pattern parsing, search, and replace helpers for binary content.

syntax.content: public static bool TryParseAddress(string? text, scoped out long address)
public static bool TryParseHexBytes(string? text, scoped out byte[] bytes)
public static long? FindNextValue(ILineReader reader, long length, byte[] pattern, long startOffset)
public static long? FindPrevValue(ILineReader reader, long length, byte[] pattern, long startOffset)
public static bool TryParseWildcardPattern(string? text, scoped out byte[] pattern, scoped out byte[] mask)
public static long? FindNextValue(ILineReader reader, long length, byte[] pattern, byte[] mask, long startOffset)
public static byte[] BuildTextPattern(string text, string encoding)
public static long? ReplaceNext(ByteOverlay overlay, ILineReader reader, byte[] find, byte[] replace, long startOffset)
public static int ReplaceAll(ByteOverlay overlay, ILineReader reader, byte[] find, byte[] replace)

items.name: MemoryMappedLineReader
items.summary: Reads bytes from a file stream by using a memory-mapped view.

syntax.content: public byte[] GetLine(long lineNumber, int width)
public int Read(long offset, byte[] buffer, int count)

items.name: NavigationService
items.summary: Tracks caret history, bookmarks, and changed-byte navigation for an overlay-backed document.

items.name: SaveService
items.summary: Saves overlay-backed content either as a full file or as a simple textual patch.

syntax.content: public static void SaveAs(ByteOverlay overlay, string path)

items.name: SelectionService
items.summary: Applies range-based copy, paste, and mutation operations against a <xref href="HexView.Avalonia.Services.ByteOverlay" data-throw-if-not-resolved="false"></xref>.

syntax.content: public void Set(long start, long length)
public void PasteHex(string hex, bool insert)
public void PasteAscii(string text, Encoding? encoding = null, bool insert = false)
